description_long: This is a modern, rectangular two-story house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The facade features large windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entryway is defined by a covered porch area with a flat overhang, flanked by small trees and a driveway leading to a garage. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white tones, with some darker accents around the entry and garage. The property is bordered by low walls and includes a small green yard area at the rear. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with an urban streetscape.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large symmetrical windows, and a covered entryway, finished in light gray and white with a small yard and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway, and landscaping with small trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, rectangular shape, flat roof, and symmetrical window rows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back yard area, rear windows, and the continuation of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, window arrangement, and boundary wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with flat overhang, steps, and flanking landscaping
